name: common.calculateBMI
use_when: Compute BMI from weight (kg) and height (cm). Use for any 'show / derive / validate BMI' intent — handles the cm→m conversion and ceiling-rounds to `precision` decimal places (default 1).
example_snippet: const weight = programEncounter.getObservationValue('Weight'); const height = programEncounter.getObservationValue('Height'); const bmi = imports.common.calculateBMI(weight, height); return new imports.rulesConfig.FormElementStatus(formElement.uuid, true, bmi);

name: common.getZScore
use_when: Compute WHO anthropometric z-scores for a child (weight-for-age, height-for-age, weight-for-height) on a given date. Returns an object with the three z-scores. Use for growth-monitoring fields.
example_snippet: const z = imports.common.getZScore(individual, programEncounter.encounterDateTime, weight, height);

name: common.getZScoreFromEncounter
use_when: Convenience wrapper: reads Weight + Height off the program encounter, computes z-scores against the individual. Use when both observations are guaranteed on the same encounter.

name: common.calculateGrowthStatusForAdolescent
use_when: Classify an adolescent's growth status from their BMI on a given date. Use for SAM / MAM / Normal categorisation on adolescent programs.
example_snippet: const status = imports.common.calculateGrowthStatusForAdolescent({individual, weight, height, asOnDate: programEncounter.encounterDateTime});

name: common.createValidationError
use_when: Produce one validation error object to push into the array returned by a validationRule. `messageKey` is the i18n key or literal error message to show the user.

name: common.addDays
use_when: Return a new Date that is `numberOfDays` after the given date. Pure offset — preserves the time-of-day. Use whenever the intent says 'N days after X'.

name: common.addMonths
use_when: Return a new Date `numberOfMonths` after the given date. Use for 'N months after X' offsets.

name: common.addWeeks
use_when: Return a new Date `numberOfWeeks` after the given date.

name: common.getAgeInMonths
use_when: Age in completed months from birth to `today`. Use for under-2 / under-5 child gating.

name: common.weeksBetween
use_when: Fractional weeks between two dates (positive when `later > earlier`). Use whenever an intent compares an interval to a week count.

name: common.getDays
use_when: Absolute day count between two dates (always positive).

name: common.getDateOfBirth
use_when: Derive a date of birth from an age (in years) and an optional reference date (defaults to today). Use when only age is captured and a DoB-shaped field needs to be set.

name: common.isBefore
use_when: Truthy when `past` is strictly before `present`. Use for date-ordering validation (no-past-date, must-be-after, etc.).
example_snippet: if (imports.common.isBefore(scheduledDate, new Date())) validationResults.push(imports.common.createValidationError('Date cannot be in the past'));

name: common.isNil
use_when: True when the value is null or undefined. Use to gate computations on missing observations.

name: common.isEmptyOrBlank
use_when: True when the value is nil, NaN, or an empty collection/string. Treats numbers / booleans / dates as non-empty.
